title: The Jedi Council

'''''The Jedi Council''''' was the second expansion card pack of the [[Young Jedi Collectible Card Game]] produced by [[Decipher]], released on [[October 27]], [[1999]]. It was based around [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], focusing on elements relating to the middle act of the movie, specifically the planet of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Many of the cards are bordered purple, the color assigned to the planet of Coruscant. This set introduced [[Senator/Legends|senators]] and [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Valorum]] to the card game. Senator [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] makes his appearance not as a playable character, but as a battle card. This avoided the "uniqueness rule" about Palpatine and [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] being on the table at the same time.

This expansion contained 140 cards.
